top3.sql:
SELECT m.label AS molecule, 
       a1.element AS atom1, 
       a2.element AS atom2, 
       b.bond_type
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single';

SELECT m.label, a1.element || '-' || a2.element AS connected_atoms
FROM bond b
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single';

SELECT m.label AS molecule, 
       a1.element AS atom1, 
       a2.element AS atom2, 
       b.bond_type
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single';

SELECT m.label, a1.element || '-' || a2.element AS connected_atoms
FROM bond b
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single';

SELECT m.label AS molecule, 
       b.bond_type, 
       a1.element AS connected_atom_1, 
       a2.element AS connected_atom_2
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single';

JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id

SELECT m.label, a1.element || '-' || a2.element AS connected_atoms
FROM bond b
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id

SELECT m.label, a1.element, a2.element
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single';

final.sql:
SELECT m.label AS molecule, 
       a1.element AS atom1, 
       a2.element AS atom2, 
       b.bond_type
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single';
